title: Herorchis × heraclea
taxonomy: Herorchis × heraclea is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from a cross between Herorchis purpurascens and Coeloglossum viride. The classification of Herorchis × heraclea is currently recognized as a legitimate hybrid. This classification is based on the orchid's unique characteristics, including its growth habit and flower morphology. In botanical nomenclature, the × symbol is used to indicate that the species is a hybrid. As such, Herorchis × heraclea is a distinct taxon within the Orchidaceae family.
